run_rate.basis: full_strategy_net / days_since_first_trade(min 7) x period (live-size normalized) — same basis as The Analyst

slip_cap_overlay.note: Counterfactual rows: "no cap" = the live book as-is (baseline); "≤N%" = drop closed live entries whose REALIZED entry_slip_pct exceeded the cap (the revert outcome of an on-chain max-slippage cap — the ≤1% cap is now ENFORCED live via COPY_ENTRY_MAX_SLIPPAGE_BPS); "≤2 entries/token" = drop the 3rd+ trade on the same mint (tracking only, NOT a live rule); "≤1% + ≤2 entries/token" = both stacked (tracking only) to see if they compound. Repeat-token counting is per-window. Ignores the 2nd-order freed-concurrency-slot substitution.
